tier_1.title: Rockslide
tier_1.description: Loose scree shifts under your boots. Stones begin to tumble above.
tier_1.success: You spot the unstable shelf and steer the party clear.
tier_1.failure: The slide catches the rear of the column. Half a day digging out.

tier_1.title: Mountain Goat Herd
tier_1.description: A herd of sure-footed goats grazes on a ledge above the trail.
tier_1.success: You snare one. Fresh meat for the camp.
tier_1.failure: They scatter at your approach. Nothing gained.

tier_1.title: Narrow Pass
tier_1.description: The trail narrows to a ledge barely wide enough for one. Wind howls below.
tier_1.success: You rope the party together and cross safely.
tier_1.failure: Vertigo and fear slow the crossing. Hours wasted.

tier_2.title: Wyvern Nest
tier_2.description: Bones litter a wide ledge. A screech echoes from above.
tier_2.success: You spot the nest and take a lower switchback unnoticed.
tier_2.failure: The wyvern dives. Protect the horses!

tier_2.title: Mountain Spring
tier_2.description: Crystal-clear water bubbles from a crack in the granite.
tier_2.success: Clean water and watercress. A welcome find.
tier_2.failure: The water tastes of sulfur. Not safe to drink.

tier_2.title: Mountain Blizzard
tier_2.description: The sky goes white. Within minutes, visibility drops to nothing.
tier_2.success: You find a cave and wait it out. No time lost.
tier_2.failure: Hours wandering blind. An entire day lost.

tier_3.title: Frost Giant Patrol
tier_3.description: Massive footprints in the snow. Each one deeper than your arm is long.
tier_3.success: You track their patrol route and slip through the gap.
tier_3.failure: A frost giant steps from behind a boulder. It's not happy.
